tasks.label: run sandboxd docker dev
tasks.command: mkdir -p /Users/brendon/Documents/or3-sandbox/.tmp/manual-run && env SANDBOX_LISTEN=127.0.0.1:18080 SANDBOX_DB_PATH=/Users/brendon/Documents/or3-sandbox/.tmp/manual-run/sandbox.db SANDBOX_STORAGE_ROOT=/Users/brendon/Documents/or3-sandbox/.tmp/manual-run/storage SANDBOX_SNAPSHOT_ROOT=/Users/brendon/Documents/or3-sandbox/.tmp/manual-run/snapshots SANDBOX_OPERATOR_HOST=http://127.0.0.1:18080 SANDBOX_RUNTIME=docker SANDBOX_TRUSTED_DOCKER_RUNTIME=true SANDBOX_MODE=development SANDBOX_AUTH_MODE=static SANDBOX_TOKENS=dev-token=tenant-dev go run ./cmd/sandboxd

tasks.label: reconfigure-live-openclaw-openrouter
tasks.command: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc 'set -eu; model="${OPENCLAW_MODEL:-minimax/minimax-m2.5}"; case "$model" in openrouter/*) ;; *) model="openrouter/$model" ;; esac; mkdir -p /home/node/.openclaw; printf "OPENROUTER_API_KEY=%s\n" "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" > /home/node/.openclaw/.env; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.shellEnv.enabled true >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.shellEnv.timeoutMs 15000 >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set agents.defaults.model.primary "$model" >/dev/null; printf "%s\n" "$model"'

tasks.label: reconfigure-live-openclaw-openrouter-v2
tasks.command: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc "set -eu; model=\"${OPENCLAW_MODEL:-minimax/minimax-m2.5}\"; case \"$model\" in openrouter/*) ;; *) model=\"openrouter/$model\" ;; esac; mkdir -p /home/node/.openclaw; printf 'OPENROUTER_API_KEY=%s\n' \"${OPENROUTER_API_KEY}\" > /home/node/.openclaw/.env; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY \"${OPENROUTER_API_KEY}\" >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.shellEnv.enabled true >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set env.shellEnv.timeoutMs 15000 >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config set agents.defaults.model.primary \"$model\" >/dev/null; printf '%s\n' \"$model\""

tasks.label: restart-live-openclaw-gateway
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc "pkill -f 'node openclaw.mjs gateway' || true; cd /app; nohup node openclaw.mjs gateway --bind=loopback --port 18789 --allow-unconfigured --verbose >/tmp/openclaw-gateway.log 2>&1 &"

tasks.label: inspect-live-openclaw-model-status
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc 'HOME=/home/node openclaw models status 2>&1 | head -40; echo ---; HOME=/home/node openclaw config get agents.defaults.model.primary 2>&1; echo ---; cat /home/node/.openclaw/.env 2>&1'

tasks.label: fix-live-openclaw-model-primary
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc 'HOME=/home/node openclaw config set agents.defaults.model.primary openrouter/minimax/minimax-m2.5 >/dev/null; HOME=/home/node openclaw config get agents.defaults.model.primary; echo ---; HOME=/home/node openclaw models status 2>&1 | head -20'

tasks.label: inspect-live-openclaw-model-primary-2
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc 'HOME=/home/node openclaw config get agents.defaults.model.primary 2>&1; echo ---; HOME=/home/node openclaw models status 2>&1 | head -15'

tasks.label: restart-live-openclaw-via-cli
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-342b281e8255c73c -- sh -lc 'HOME=/home/node openclaw gateway restart 2>&1 | head -40'

tasks.label: run-openclaw-preset-with-dotenv
tasks.command: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl preset run openclaw --cleanup never

tasks.label: inspect-fresh-openclaw-preset-sandbox
tasks.command: SANDBOX_API=http://127.0.0.1:8080 SANDBOX_TOKEN=${OR3_API_TOKEN:-dev-token} go run ./cmd/sandboxctl exec sbx-3059ebfc1a176873 -- sh -lc 'HOME=/home/node openclaw config get agents.defaults.model.primary 2>&1; echo ---; HOME=/home/node openclaw models status 2>&1 | head -15; echo ---; cat /home/node/.openclaw/.env 2>&1'
